fact: AW v20 MCP fully operational: all 12 tools wired and tested. State persistence via GitHub. Canon library indexed at 57 files / 83,718 words.

Apple deal locked: $215M year 1 global ambassador; 3-year option $510M total; Electric Ivory bundled — audio $40M against on Apple Music, film $15M against on Apple Music Classical; al.x retains all rights; Apple TV+ option held but not exercised
Aston Martin deal locked: $58M year 1, 3-year $160M, two cars annually including one bespoke
Audemars Piguet deal locked: $30M year 1, 3-year $90M, six watches annually, two co-designed editions, tech-adjacent watch lockout against Patek; Beyoncé-gift Patek remains private regardless
Fashion week closers locked: Stella McCartney LFW £3M (path to £4.5M+); Ralph Lauren NYFW $8M + $5M campaign asset; Saint Laurent PFW €5M + house-deal language for long-term; Versace MFW €4M

IMG free-agent fashion-week strategy: nothing free; long-term house deals held until after Paris closes early October. Casa Dragones tequila ambassadorship declined. Samsung blocked by Apple category exclusivity ($180M not engaged). Walker Foundation auto-allocation set at 15% of all new commercial revenue.
Letty appointed in-house wardrobe handler from Wed 13 Aug 2025. Three stylist intros taken Fri 15 Aug — Sophie Lopez, Cher Coulter, Ben Schofield — pick still open at session end

Guards Polo Club Windsor, GOSH charity match: Alex #3 White's vs William #2 Red's; White's win 3-2; Alex scores winner in dying seconds of fourth chukka; £1.4M raised. Post-match hand-through-hair Getty wire becomes most-licensed image of the year

Eddy Cue (Apple SVP Services) at Albury House, 15:00–16:50; garden room conversation then music nobile; Alex plays Bill Evans Peace Piece on the 1910 Bechstein; Apple deal closes in the room. Eddy invites Alex to Cupertino post-Paris to meet Tim Cook

Lila Moss arrives at Albury 15:00 for a planned one-night; weekend extends Sat 16 Aug (full day, basement pool, garden) and Sun 17 Aug (still present at Brain Trust brunch — unusual pattern for Alex). Both characterise it to BT as "a very good weekend, not a thing"; treated by group as one-off going forward
Brain Trust brunch at Albury, ~11:30: Apple Martin, Iris Law, Kaia Gerber (off JFK red-eye), Rocco Ritchie, Lila Moss, Alex. Apple closes any further outside-group discussion of the Alex–Lila weekend

Sarah's dinner with the girls at Albury — Stella McCartney, Kate Moss, Naomi Campbell, Sadie Frost, Sienna Miller, Madonna, Trudie Styler, Tracey Emin, Amber Valletta, Mary McCartney, Plum Sykes; Rafael cooking in Supper Room; Stella sees the McQueen wall first
